records.ety: [F. carnation the flesh tints in a painting, It carnagione, fr. L. carnatio fleshiness, fr. caro, carnis, flesh. See Carnal.]

defs: The natural color of flesh; rosy pink.
quotes: Her complexion of the delicate carnation.

defs: Those parts of a picture in which the human body or any part of it is represented in full color; the flesh tints.
quotes: The flesh tints in painting are termed carnations.

defs: A species of Dianthus (Dianthus Caryophyllus) or pink, having very beautiful flowers of various colors, esp. white and usually a rich, spicy scent.
